pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spirit within me. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has set upon my soul. I find myself staring into the shadows of this empty manor, wondering why the dawn should ever bother to break again. It feels as though the velvet darkness is calling to me, promising a silence that this cruel, loud world can no longer provide. Is it not a mercy, sometimes, to simply let the tide carry one away into the eternal night?
